         if preds.shape[-2:] != masks.shape[-2:]:

             preds = F.interpolate(preds.unsqueeze(1).float(), size=masks.shape[-2:], mode='nearest').squeeze(1).long()

         valid = masks != ignore_index

-        preds_valid = preds[valid]

-        masks_valid = masks[valid]

-        if masks_valid.numel() > 0:

-            k = masks_valid.long() * num_classes + preds_valid.long()

-            conf_mat += torch.bincount(k, minlength=num_classes * num_classes).view(num_classes, num_classes).double()

+        p = preds[valid]

+        m = masks[valid]

+        if p.numel() > 0:

+            indices = p * num_classes + m

+            bins = torch.bincount(indices, minlength=num_classes * num_classes).double()

+            conf_mat += bins.view(num_classes, num_classes)

     if dist.is_initialized():

         dist.all_reduce(conf_mat, op=dist.ReduceOp.SUM)

-    intersection = conf_mat.diag()

-    union = conf_mat.sum(1) + conf_mat.sum(0) - conf_mat.diag()

-    ious = intersection / (union + 1e-10)

-    miou = ious.mean().item()

+    ious = []

+    for i in range(num_classes):

+        tp = conf_mat[i, i]

+        fp = conf_mat[:, i].sum() - tp

+        fn = conf_mat[i, :].sum() - tp

+        denom = tp + fp + fn

+        ious.append((tp / denom).item() if denom > 0 else 0.0)

     model.train()

-    return miou

+    return np.mean(ious)

+

+    train_transform = build_transforms(mean, std, split='training', crop_size=args.crop_size)

+    val_transform = build_transforms(mean, std, split='validation', crop_size=args.crop_size)

+

+    train_dataset = ADE20KDataset(args.data_dir, split='training', transform=train_transform)

+    val_dataset = ADE20KDataset(args.data_dir, split='validation', transform=val_transform)

+

+    train_sampler = DistributedSampler(train_dataset, num_replicas=world_size, rank=rank, shuffle=True) if world_size > 1 else None

+    val_sampler = DistributedSampler(val_dataset, num_replicas=world_size, rank=rank, shuffle=False) if world_size > 1 else None

+

+    train_loader = DataLoader(train_dataset, batch_size=args.batch_size, sampler=train_sampler, num_workers=args.num_workers, pin_memory=True, drop_last=True)

+    val_loader = DataLoader(val_dataset, batch_size=args.batch_size, sampler=val_sampler, num_workers=args.num_workers, pin_memory=True, drop_last=False)

+

+    model = SegmentationModel(num_classes=num_classes, pretrained=True).to(device)

+    start_epoch = 0

+    best_miou = 0.0

+

+            logger.info(f'Resuming from {args.resume}')

+        checkpoint = torch.load(args.resume, map_location=device)

+        model.load_state_dict(checkpoint, strict=True)

+
